mapper.select: SELECT COUNT(1) > 0 FROM t_student WHERE student_id = #{studentId}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO t_student (student_id, internal_id, name, last_sync_at, created_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{internalId}, #{name}, #{lastSyncAt}, NOW())

INSERT INTO t_student (student_id, internal_id, name, last_sync_at, created_at) VALUES (#{studentId}, #{internalId}, #{name}, #{lastSyncAt}, NOW()) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE internal_id = VALUES(internal_id), name = VALUES(name), last_sync_at = VALUES(last_sync_at)
